title: Conselho de Ministros aprova Estratégia Nacional para a Cibersegurança
description: Government of Cape Verde announcement that the Council of Ministers approved the National Cybersecurity Strategy and created the Nucleo Nacional de Ciberseguranca. General cyber strategy; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.

title: Gestao da Seguranca - Banco de Cabo Verde
description: Central bank (Banco de Cabo Verde) security-management press/archive page. General information security; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.

title: Certificados Digitais - PKI (NOSi)
description: NOSi (national digital agency) public-key infrastructure / digital certificates page. Classical PKI and digital signatures; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.

title: "Nha Card" - Cabo Verde's digital certificate officially launched (NOSi)
description: NOSi announcement of the launch of Cape Verde's national digital certificate. Classical digital certification; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.

title: Credenciacao NOSi-EPE como autoridade de certificacao digital
description: NOSi accreditation as a digital certification authority issuing second-level digital certificates and electronic signatures. Classical cryptography; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.

title: ECRCV - Entidade Certificadora Raiz de Cabo Verde (ANAC)
description: ANAC (National Communications Agency) site, host of the Cape Verde Root Certification Authority. Telecom/ICT regulation and classical PKI; no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography or PQC.
